value.name: xWFData
value.description: The workflow document that is being routed through the workflow. This variable contains all of the intake data along with data used to build workflow logic.

value.name: vDocIDs
value.description: List of documents that will appear in a task

value.name: vRoute
value.description: Workflow route

value.name: vRoutePrevious
value.description: The Previous vRoute so we can return to it.

value.name: aPreviousUser
value.description: The Previous User that acted on any step

value.name: vSubWorkflowName
value.description: Name of Sub Workflow that would fail

value.name: vErrorEmailBody
value.description: Error email body that is passed from child workflow or set in this workflow

value.name: xEnvironmentSettings
value.description: Environment Settings

value.name: xAppSettings
value.description: Application Settings

value.name: vTaskUser
value.description: The SYS_Selected_Route_TaskUser

value.name: vSelectedTaskGroup
value.description: The Task Group from SYS_Selected_Route_TaskGroup

value.name: aTaskUser
value.description: The Task User

value.name: vMainDocId
value.description: Main agreement document

value.name: dNextRouteSelection
value.description: The Next Route Selection csv in XML format

value.name: vNextRouteSubWF
value.description: The Sub WF name to be called

value.name: dNextRouteSubWF
value.description: The Sub WF to call for next route

value.name: dUpdateMetadataMapping
value.description: The csv for Metadata Mapping

value.name: aChoosenUser
value.description: This is the user selected in the Choose User Step

value.name: dDynamicAssigment
value.description: Read the DynamicAssigment csv

value.name: dGroupForChooseUser
value.description: The csv for Group for Choose User

value.name: sChooseUserGroupName
value.description: The Group Name used for Choose User Step
